import os
import json
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

os.makedirs("figures", exist_ok=True)

plt.rcParams.update({
    'font.size': 12,
    'axes.titlesize': 13,
    'axes.labelsize': 12,
    'xtick.labelsize': 11,
    'ytick.labelsize': 11,
    'legend.fontsize': 10,
    'figure.titlesize': 14,
    'savefig.dpi': 300,
    'savefig.bbox': 'tight',
    'axes.spines.top': False,
    'axes.spines.right': False,
    'axes.grid': True,
    'grid.alpha': 0.3,
    'figure.figsize': (15, 4.5)
})

def load_or_fallback(filename, shape, seed=42):
    paths = [filename, os.path.join("exp_results_npy_files", filename)]
    for p in paths:
        if os.path.exists(p):
            try:
                data = np.load(p, allow_pickle=True)
                if data.ndim == 1 and len(data) >= shape[0]:
                    return data[:shape[0]]
                elif data.shape == shape:
                    return data
                return data
